parameters:
- name: workspace
  type: string

- name: dependsOn
  type: object
  default: []

- name: azureServiceConnection
  type: string

- name: backendVariableGroup
  type: string

- name: functionAppName
  type: string

- name: functionPackage
  type: string

- name: resourceGroup
  type: string

pool:
  name: Default
  demands:
  - msbuild
  - visualstudio

stages:
- stage: ${{ parameters.workspace }}
  dependsOn: ${{ parameters.dependsOn }}
